title: Logo präzise vektorisieren
desc: Ich stelle dir mein Logo als PNG/JPG zur Verfügung und brauche davon eine saubere, verlustfrei skalierbare Vektordatei. • Das Ergebnis soll in Formaten wie AI, EPS und SVG vorliegen. • Gestaltung, Farben und Proportionen müssen 1:1 mit dem Original übereinstimmen – keine stilistischen Abweichungen, keine Vereinfachungen. • Alle Kurven und Kanten sollen glatt nachgezeichnet, Texte in Pfade umgewandelt und Ebenen sinnvoll benannt sein, damit spätere Anpassungen leicht möglich sind. Bitte arbeite exakt, damit das Logo in jeder Größe gestochen scharf bleibt. Sobald du fertig bist, sende mir die offenen Dateien sowie eine PDF-Ansicht zum schnellen Prüfen.

title: Logo to Banner and Flyer Design
desc: My small upholstery business needs a simple logo developed into a banner and flyer for advertisement. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and print design, ensuring the final products are visually appealing and effective for marketing purposes. The project is part-time and expected to be completed in less than a month.

title: Looking for a graphic designer to make flyers for my company.
desc: Hi, so I run a company and have been making promo flyers for it myself. They're not bad (See attached) and they have done INCREDIBLY well as Meta ads... But I just don't want to spend time on graphic design anymore. So I'm looking for someone to take over. There are several flyers that I need for my business, so looking for someone to become my reliable go-to flyer maker. If you have your own style, great. If you want to copy the style I have already, awesome. I just like bright colors that pop and fun visuals. Message me and lets get started! If you're 420 friendly, its a plus, as my business is in that field.

title: Luxury Hotel Brochure Design
desc: We are seeking a talented designer to create a high-end brochure for our luxury hotel. The brochure should reflect the hotel's elegance and sophistication, showcasing its unique features and amenities. The ideal candidate will have experience in luxury branding and a keen eye for detail. The project involves designing a 4-page brochure that aligns with our brand's high standards.

title: Luxury, modern flyer design
desc: Hello dear, looking for a professional graphic design who can help with the luxury modern design flyer size 8.5 x 11“ need to be very professional have attention to the spelling mistakes or error on the language, high definition images will be added, and all the contact information, the colour must be clear the weight of the file less than 10 MP, let me know if that job can be suitable for you. Thank you.

title: Mailchimp Email Campaign Designer
desc: We are looking for a creative Mailchimp Email Campaign Designer to create visually appealing, on-brand email campaigns that engage subscribers and drive clicks. Your primary focus will be email design and layout creation within Mailchimp. You should have a strong eye for design, understand email marketing best practices, and be able to create responsive, mobile-friendly campaigns that align with our brand identity. Requirements: • Proven experience designing emails in Mailchimp • Strong visual design and branding skills • Ability to create clean, high-converting email layouts • Experience with responsive email design Please share samples of Mailchimp email campaigns you have designed.

title: Maintenance Service Promo Poster
desc: I need a striking digital poster that spotlights my maintenance service and drives new sign-ups. The design should instantly convey reliability, quick response, and professional care while featuring our logo, contact details, and a clear call-to-action. Think bold headline, concise copy, and imagery that visually signals “we fix it fast.” The final artwork must work equally well on social media feeds and as an A4 print, so please balance screen impact with print legibility. Feel free to suggest a fresh colour palette or typography that still sits comfortably with our existing branding. Deliverables (all in RGB and CMYK): • Editable source file (AI or PSD) • High-resolution PDF for print • Optimised PNG/JPEG for web and social I’ll provide the logo, a short value proposition, and any compliance text as soon as we start. If you have previous examples of service-focused promotional posters, I’d love to see them when you bid.

title: Marketing Brochure with images, colors, fonts, copy taken from extant marketing site
desc: Utilizing the images, colors and fonts as well as data points from an existing marketing website, create a brochure ready to print to Moo specifications for a tri-fold brochure. The design should match that of the exiting marketing site, no new logos, images, fonts or colors needed. Data to be included will be clarified with designer. Short delivery time is anticipated given the project is straightforward: transfer the same design elements from the site, the same content, to a brochure. This will allow us to communicate with off-line customers.

title: Marketing Flyer and Form Creation
desc: Need someone to take a logo I created and then create a marketing flyer and a form Word document. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and document creation. The project is small in scale and requires an intermediate level of proficiency.

title: Marketing poster for a new collectible cards website
desc: I want to put marketing posters all over a street near me and I would like your help to make a design. I already have some designs made for the website, but I wouldn't mind being creative for the poster. I need something engaging that invites people to either scan the QR code or enter the URL for my website. It's a solo project and I'm just starting it. I would really appreciate it if you could take the lead on the design elements.

title: Minimalist Graduation Stole Design
desc: I need a clean, minimalist graduation-stole layout created directly in Canva so I can tweak names or dates later if needed. The design should feel elegant and modern—think subtle lines, balanced spacing, and no heavy ornamentation—while still reading instantly as academic regalia when printed on fabric. Please set the artwork to a full-bleed stole template (roughly 5in x 72in, front and back), keep all text and key elements within safe margins, and work in CMYK-friendly colors so the printer can reproduce it accurately. Once finished, share the editable Canva link and a print-ready PDF. Deliverables: • Editable Canva file link • Print-ready PDF (high-resolution, CMYK) I’ll provide wording, emblem upload, and any final color accents the moment we start; you just focus on giving it that unmistakably minimalist polish.

title: Minimalist Lithium Battery Sticker
desc: I’m refreshing the look of our lithium-ion battery packs and need a clean, minimalist sticker that doubles as subtle branding. The sticker must feature two things only: our company logo in a visually balanced position and the essential battery specifications (voltage, capacity, chemistry, model number). No extra graphics or copy—just crisp typography, generous white space, and a layout that feels contemporary rather than decorative. Size will follow the standard battery housing label area (I’ll share exact millimetre dimensions once we start). Please keep the colour palette limited to our corporate black, white, and one accent tone pulled from the brand guide; gradients or busy backgrounds are out. Deliverables • Print-ready PDF with 3 mm bleed and crop marks • Editable source file (AI or layered PSD) with outlined fonts and linked assets • A quick mock-up on a cylindrical cell image so I can visualise placement If you think a tiny compliance icon would balance the design without cluttering it, let me know, but it isn’t mandatory. File hand-off will be complete once the artwork passes my in-house test print for legibility at 100 % scale.

title: Modern Business Brochure Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a modern, professional brochure for our business. The brochure should effectively communicate our brand's message and values, incorporating our logo and color scheme. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and brochure creation, with a strong portfolio showcasing previous work. Attention to detail and creativity are essential.

title: Modern Functional Medicine Flyer
desc: I already have a drafted flyer for an upcoming functional-medicine coaching session; the wording is final and the “Functional Medicine Coach in Training” badge must stay exactly where it is. What I need is a fresh visual treatment—background, colour palette, and overall polish—so the piece feels modern and clean while still matching the colours found in the functional-medicine banner featured on the draft. Please take my existing file (PDF and PowerPoint versions are available) and: • Refine the background so it complements, rather than competes with, the banner colours. • Update the overall colour scheme to harmonise with those same tones. • Re-balance spacing and typography if needed, but keep every word of the current text untouched. • Preserve the badge’s size, clarity, and position. Final deliverables: print-ready PDF (A4) plus an editable source file (Adobe Illustrator or InDesign preferred; Canva acceptable if you work primarily there). I’ll supply the draft and banner files as soon as we start. Looking forward to seeing how you can elevate this into a crisp, professional flyer.

title: Modern Product Advert Poster Design
desc: I'm looking for a modern-style poster to advertise a product. Requirements: - Product features - Company contact details - Promotional offer Ideal Skills and Experience: - Graphic design expertise - Experience with modern design aesthetics - Ability to create engaging layouts and visuals Please include samples of previous work.

title: Modern Product Poster Design
desc: I’m looking for a fresh, eye-catching poster that will advertise one of my key products. The look I’m after is distinctly modern and clean—minimal clutter, strong hierarchy, and plenty of white space so the product stays front and center. Here’s what I need from you: • One print-ready poster for product advertising (preferred size 18"×24", but advise if another dimension suits best). • Source file in Adobe Photoshop (layered PSD) or, if you prefer, Canva with full editing rights. • High-resolution PDF (CMYK, 300 dpi) ready for professional printing. • Web-ready JPEG/PNG for online use. Please incorporate my brand colors and logo (I’ll supply assets on award). If we nail this piece, I’ll likely roll the same style out across banners or additional promotional materials down the road, so consistent, reusable design choices matter. Send over a brief note on your concept, turnaround time, and any relevant samples that match a modern, clean aesthetic. I’m ready to get started as soon as I find the right fit.

title: Modern Promotional Business Flyer Design
desc: I'm seeking a talented designer to create a modern and sleek promotional flyer for my business. The flyer will be used to attract potential customers. Requirements: - Modern and sleek design - Eye-catching visuals - Clear and persuasive copy - High-resolution, print-ready format -include my logo, QR code, phone number email and vbusiness cars -Include promotional discount for first 10 people Ideal skills and experience: - Graphic design proficiency - Experience with promotional materials - Strong typography and layout skills - Portfolio showcasing modern designs I am uploading my current flyer with my packages and logo on it for reference and see what you can do I will be sending these in the mail to potential customers Please provide samples of previous work and a brief outline of your design approach.

title: Modern Tour Package PDF Design
desc: I’m putting together a professionally-designed PDF that showcases one of our upcoming tour packages. The look I have in mind is modern, clean, and airy—white space, clear hierarchy, and visuals that immediately make a traveler want to keep reading. Content I will supply includes the full day-by-day itinerary, the pricing table with available payment schedules, a short set of travel tips and recommendations, a brief “About Us” overview, real customer testimonials, and our contact information. Your task is to weave all of this into a cohesive, on-brand document that is easy to skim on-screen yet still prints beautifully. I’d like the final file delivered both as a high-resolution, print-ready PDF and as an editable source file (Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, or Canva are all fine). Please use licensing-safe fonts, align colors with our existing palette, and optimize any photos for quick download without sacrificing clarity. Deliverables: • Print-ready PDF (A4 and US Letter) • Interactive PDF (clickable links for email, phone, and web) • Editable source file in the design tool of your choice I’ll review for layout consistency, readability, and brand alignment before approving the final version.

title: Non-Towing Roadside Service Flyer Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional flyer for our non-towing roadside service business. The flyer should effectively communicate our services, including jump starts, fuel delivery, and lockout assistance, while highlighting our competitive pricing and quick response times. The design should be visually appealing and suitable for print distribution. Please provide samples of previous work.

title: One Page Print Announcement Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a one-page print announcement for a new employee. The design should be professional, welcoming, and include the employee's name, position, and a photo. The announcement will be printed on standard 8.5 x 11 paper. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and layout, ensuring a visually appealing and cohesive look. Final deliverable will be the working art file and the print ready PDF.

title: Paperback Cover Design for Kindle Books
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a paperback cover that matches our existing Kindle cover. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and print design, ensuring the cover is visually appealing and suitable for print. The project involves designing a cover that aligns with the Kindle version, requiring creativity and attention to detail. If you have a portfolio showcasing similar work, we would love to see it.

title: Photo Colour Correction for Mood
desc: I have a batch of photos that need a careful colour treatment to evoke a distinct mood and artistic feel—not simply boosting saturation, but balancing tones, shadows and highlights so the viewer senses the intended atmosphere at first glance. The raw or high-resolution originals will be supplied immediately after we agree on the job. Please work in Photoshop, Lightroom, Capture One or any comparable professional tool; non-destructive editing is essential because I may ask for minor tweaks once I review your first pass. Turnaround is tight: I’d like the fully corrected images back within a couple of days. Deliverables • Colour-graded, high-resolution JPEGs (sRGB) • Layered PSD or TIFF files with adjustments intact • Brief note on the primary adjustments or LUTs used I will sign off once the images share a coherent mood, preserve natural skin tones where relevant, and display no clipping or banding. If this matches your skill set and timeframe, let’s get started right away.

title: Plastic Folder Cover Design
desc: I will supply a high-resolution image that must drive the entire look of the project. Your task is to turn that single asset into a unified front and back artwork for a plastic folder; both sides should share the same design so the folder feels seamless when opened flat. The aesthetic should come directly from the image I provide—colour palette, mood and any supporting elements should be derived from it rather than imposed. Feel free to introduce tasteful typography or subtle graphic accents if they strengthen the concept, but please keep the photo as the hero. Deliverables • Print-ready PDF sized for a standard A4 (220x305 vertical) plastic folder with at least 3 mm bleed • Editable source file (AI, PSD or similar) so my print shop can make final adjustments I’m happy to answer sizing or bleed questions up front to keep revisions minimal. Let me know if additional specs are useful.

title: Popup Banner print files
desc: Hi - I have a very small job - but more could be coming. We need a print ready file creating for this banner with this QR code. Logos and fonts etc. at https://madebyai.me/ & https://joggle.it/ Will need a PNG/PDF for proof and then final artwork so we can upload to get banner printed. We have 2 different banners to do. 1) MadeByAI one - attached - and 2) a Joggle one Please let me know timeframe you need to do both. Spec for print here: https://rollerbannersuk.co.uk/content-hub/roller-banner-design/ https://rollerbannersuk.co.uk/supplying-artwork-faq/

title: Portrait White Background Editing
desc: I have between 200-250 portrait photos that all need a clean white backdrop. The people in each shot must stay exactly as they are—no trimming hair, reshaping faces, or altering colours—just remove the existing setting and drop in an even, studio-style white. Here’s what I need from you: • Final images returned in both high-resolution JPEG (sRGB) and PNG with transparent edges preserved. • Consistent pure-white background (RGB 255-255-255) across the whole batch so they look uniform when placed side by side. • File names kept identical to the originals for easy replacement. • A brief sample set first (5–10 images) so I can confirm the lighting and edge work before you process the full run. I’ll supply the RAW or high-res JPEG source files via a cloud link as soon as we start. Fast, precise masking and a natural feathered edge around hair and fine details are important, and I’m aiming for a quick turnaround once the sample is approved.

title: Postcard Template Designer Needed
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a template for postcards using our logo and colors. The ideal candidate should be able to customize the design as needed to ensure it aligns with our brand identity. Experience in print design and graphic design is essential. The project requires an intermediate level of proficiency and offers a flexible engagement with a part-time commitment.

title: Poster Design for Taco Special
desc: Create a vibrant 24" x 36" poster for a $1 taco special paired with $9 Margaritas. The design should be eye-catching and clearly communicate the offer. Incorporate elements that reflect the festive atmosphere of a taco night. The poster should be ready for print and include all necessary details such as pricing and any promotional messages.

title: Poster Pengumuman Informasi Menarik
desc: Saya mencari ide desain grafis terbaik untuk sebuah poster pengumuman informasi. Poster ini akan dipasang baik secara digital maupun cetak, jadi saya memerlukan hasil yang fleksibel dan mudah disesuaikan. Apa yang saya butuhkan: • Satu konsep poster original yang langsung menyampaikan pesan utama pengumuman. • Ukuran dasar A3; versi A4 ikut disertakan. • File akhir berformat .AI atau .PSD beserta PDF siap cetak (300 dpi, CMYK). • Versi web (JPEG/PNG, 1080 px sisi terpanjang) agar mudah dibagikan di media sosial. • Tipografi jelas, warna kontras, dan ruang untuk memasukkan teks pengumuman final. Gaya desain sepenuhnya terbuka—minimalis, ilustratif, ataupun fotografi—selama tetap informatif dan mudah dibaca dari jarak pandang poster biasa. Sertakan mock-up penempatan (mis. di dinding atau papan pengumuman) agar saya bisa membayangkan hasil akhirnya. Kriteria penilaian: 1. Keterbacaan pesan inti dalam 3 detik pertama. 2. Orisinalitas layout dan elemen grafis. 3. Kesesuaian warna serta tipografi dengan tema informatif. 4. Kemudahan adaptasi ke ukuran atau bahasa lain. Kirimkan desain terbaik Anda; saya siap memilih satu pemenang dan segera menindaklanjuti dengan file lengkap untuk diproduksi.

title: PowerPoint Company Profile Design
desc: I need a polished, visually engaging company profile created directly in PowerPoint and pdf so that my team can update it internally whenever needed. The finished deck should flow logically from an introductory slide through the core details of the business, using consistent typography, colour palette, and modern graphic elements that reflect a professional brand image. Please show examples of your past work on similar corporate presentations when you reply—those samples will help me judge whether your design style matches what I have in mind. If you have experience crafting concise copy or sourcing high-resolution imagery, let me know; otherwise I can supply the text and logos and you can focus purely on layout, iconography, and overall visual hierarchy. The final deliverable must be a fully editable .pptx file and pdf(no locked objects) with master slides set up for easy future additions.

title: PowerPoint Enhancement
desc: I need assistance to make my PowerPoint presentation more visually appealing and polished. Requirements: - Maintain a professional and clean style - Improve fonts and text layout - Enhance image and graphics quality - Use provided corporate slides and colors Ideal Skills and Experience: - Proficiency in PowerPoint - Strong design skills for professional presentations - Experience with corporate branding and templates - Attention to detail and ability to follow guidelines Please provide samples of previous work.

title: PowerPoint Presentation Design
desc: I need someone to help me design a PowerPoint presentation, focusing on ideation and content placement within a given template. The task needs to be completed within 24 hours. The ideal candidate should have experience in presentation design and be proficient in Microsoft PowerPoint.

title: PowerPoint Presentation Design
desc: I need a cleaned-up PowerPoint with visuals. I have a sample of how it could look but have to use a specific template. The task involves creating a visually appealing presentation that aligns with the provided template. I need by tomorroe by 3:00.

title: PowerPoint Presentation Designer
desc: We are seeking a designer with basic skills to create approximately 40-50 PowerPoint presentations. The ideal candidate should have a good understanding of design principles and be able to work efficiently to meet deadlines. The task involves not only creating the presentations but also ensuring they are visually appealing and consistent in style.

title: PowerPoint Presentation Designer Needed for Leadership Training Deck + Worksheets
desc: I am looking for a PowerPoint presentation designer to create a professional, polished, and visually engaging deck for a leadership presentation. The presentation content and slide outline are already written. I need someone to design the deck in PowerPoint only. This project also includes matching worksheet/activity pages designed in PowerPoint. Before completing the full deck, I would like to see 2–3 sample slides so I can approve the visual direction. Please only apply if you are immediately available to begin. Deliverables Editable PowerPoint presentation deck Editable worksheet/activity pages in PowerPoint 2–3 sample slides for style approval before full completion Speaker notes copied into the PowerPoint notes section for each corresponding slide Important Requirements Final files must be created and delivered in PowerPoint format only. The deck must remain fully editable. The presentation notes that accompany each slide must be copied into the speaker notes area of the corresponding PowerPoint slide. Please only apply if you are available to begin immediately. Style The deck should feel professional, warm, motivating, inspiring, clean, and easy to follow. It should not feel boring, crowded, overly playful, or template-heavy. I will provide the presentation outline, content

title: Powerpoint presentation design
desc: I need a powerpoint presentation to be populated with info that will be provided. Info per slide and so on. I will need designs and charts. I have a template or brand colors and logo which will be shared. All that is required is execution. Need it in 12hours

title: Presentation
desc: I have compiled detailed information for a PowerPoint presentation and would appreciate assistance in professionally formatting it. I would like someone who can enhance the presentation with animations and images to effectively illustrate the concepts. Please ensure that the design is visually appealing and follows a strong outline, keeping the total to a maximum of 15 slides. Your expertise in crafting a polished, engaging presentation would be invaluable. Thank you

title: Presentation Designer
desc: I'm looking to make some minimal corrections to an editorial slide deck, mainly involving logo addition and photo swaps. Scope of work - Add company logo to slide deck - Swap selected photos with provided images References - I will provide the company logo and photos for swapping. Presentation language English Need this due today

title: Presentation Designer for Canva and PowerPoint
desc: We are seeking a skilled presentation designer to create engaging and professional slides using Canva and PowerPoint. The ideal candidate will have experience in crafting visually appealing presentations that effectively communicate information. Responsibilities include designing slides, incorporating graphics, and ensuring consistency in design elements. If you have a passion for presentation design and a keen eye for detail, we would love to hear from you!

title: Product Catalogue Redesign
desc: I need someone (NOT AI) to help me redesign my product catalogues. I have a few catalogues for different products and services, each with a different design. The goal is to create a cohesive and visually appealing look across all catalogues.

title: Product Labels Needing Updated!
desc: I need someone to help me update a label on a few of our products. Label is made, it just needs its height increased 1" and the design re-formatted to account for the new 1" increase in height. Need this just on a handful of labels Should be a quick job

title: Product Launch Poster Design
desc: I’m launching a new product and need a standout promotional poster. I can give you our full branding guidelines—including logo files, color palette, and typography—so everything stays on brand. Scope • Either refine my current draft or create a fresh concept from scratch. • Layout must suit both print (A3 or similar) and online sharing (social media, email). • Highlight the product launch message clearly and persuasively. Deliverables • Editable source file (AI or layered PSD). • Print-ready PDF (300 dpi, CMYK). • Web-ready JPG/PNG versions. I’ll provide the launch copy and any product images as soon as we start. Please bring a clean, modern look that follows the supplied guidelines, and let me know your estimated turnaround and any questions you have before we begin.

title: Professional Brand Designer Needed
desc: We are seeking a professional brand designer to finalize an existing logo and create a business card, letterhead, and social media kit. The ideal candidate will have experience in brand design and logo creation, ensuring consistency across all materials. This part-time role requires intermediate proficiency and is expected to last 1 to 3 months.

title: Professional Brochure Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional brochure for our business. The brochure should effectively communicate our brand's message and values, and be visually appealing to our audience. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and a strong portfolio showcasing previous work. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this project.

title: Professional Brochure Design for Marketing
desc: I need a professional and catchy brochure design for a technical solution to enhance marketing efforts. The design should be visually appealing and instill confidence in potential customers. The ideal candidate will have experience in creating marketing materials that effectively convey key messages and engage audiences.

title: Professional Logo Vectorization
desc: I have a logo for my business that needs to be vectorized professionally. The task involves converting the logo into a vector format to ensure high-quality scaling and precision. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and be proficient in using Adobe Illustrator. The project is small in scale and requires an intermediate level of proficiency.

title: Professional One-Page Business Overview Design
desc: We're seeking a creative designer to craft a visually appealing one-page document that clearly communicates our business offerings to potential clients. The design should be engaging, professional, and align with our brand identity. The ideal candidate will have experience in creating marketing materials and be able to present complex information in a simple, digestible format. Your portfolio should showcase similar work. If you have a keen eye for design and a knack for storytelling through visuals, we want to hear from you!

title: Professional Resume Design
desc: I am seeking a skilled designer to create a professional resume that highlights my experience and skills. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and resume writing, ensuring the final product is visually appealing and effective in showcasing my strengths. The project requires creativity and attention to detail to produce a high-quality resume.

title: Professional Typesetting for Manuscript
desc: I have a completed 128-page manuscript currently designed in Canva. The content and cover are complete. I need the interior professionally typeset and formatted for print-on-demand. The ideal candidate will have experience in book design and layout, ensuring a polished and professional finish. Attention to detail and creativity in design are essential.

title: Quick Flyer Redo - needed today!
desc: I need someone to recreate the attached flyer but update the logo and change the text slightly for me. I need it by EOD today. Very straightforward - just recreate what I already have (8.5x5.5 vertical) so I can get it printed this weekend. Thanks!

title: Quick cards graphic design
desc: Hi I have a card game concept and concept design, u need some one to copy/finalize concept design and get a print ready file done that works with the template. Need turnaround in just a day or two from hire
